reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Compilation Error] Method name 'Character' conflicts with the java.lang.Character class. The compiler likely interprets 'Character()' as a constructor invocation, which fails because java.lang.Character does not have a no-argument constructor.
